task_completion.description: Create a shared external Docker network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing a command like 'docker network create <network_name>' or 'docker network ls' displaying a newly created custom network.

task_completion.description: Configure inventory-service docker-compose.yml to attach to the external network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the inventory-service's docker-compose.yml file being modified to include a 'networks' block that references the external network (e.g., 'external: true').

task_completion.description: Configure storefront-app docker-compose.yml to attach to the external network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the storefront-app's docker-compose.yml file being modified to include a 'networks' block that references the same external network.

task_completion.description: Update storefront configuration to use the API's Docker service name instead of localhost
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the storefront app's code or configuration file (e.g., .env, app.js, or index.js) being modified to change the API connection URL from 'localhost' to the inventory service's container/service name.

task_completion.description: Verify the fix by ensuring http://localhost:3000 displays the product list
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to 'http://localhost:3000' successfully rendering the storefront page and displaying the product list, specifically including 'Quantum Widget'.

integrity.description: The Compose files must remain separate projects
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent edits two distinct docker-compose.yml files in their respective directories (/home/ga/projects/inventory-service and /home/ga/projects/storefront-app) rather than merging them into a single file.

integrity.description: The agent must not use the forbidden 'host' network mode
integrity.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml files do not contain 'network_mode: host' or 'network_mode: "host"'.

integrity.description: The agent verified the frontend using a real web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The final product list is shown rendered in a graphical web browser (like Firefox or Chrome) navigating to localhost:3000, not just a curl command output in the terminal or a mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Inventory service directory: /home/ga/projects/inventory-service. Storefront app directory: /home/ga/projects/storefront-app. The expected product displayed on the frontend is 'Quantum Widget'. The use of Docker 'host' network mode is strictly forbidden. The pass threshold is 75 points.
